item.title: Medical Tourism 101
item.description: Millions of people travel to a different country for medical care every year. My friend Ann* is one of them. My first response when I heard she wanted...

item.description: There are several types of lupus, but people often use the word “lupus” to mean systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), the most common form of the diseas...

item.title: Managing Chronic Hives That Come Out of Nowhere
item.description: Español Chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) , hives (urticaria) that last 6 weeks or longer (chronic) and have an unknown cause (spontaneous), can hav...

item.title: Control de sarpullidos que aparecen de la nada y que no desaparecen (urticaria crónica espontánea)
item.description: English La urticaria crónica espontánea (UCE) , es decir, sarpullido (urticaria) que dura 6 semanas o más (crónica) y que tiene un motivo desconocido ...

item.title: Women’s Heart Health Has Been Overlooked for Decades. Tech Is Finally Catching Up.
item.description: Brittany Barreto, Ph.D., is a podcaster, an entrepreneur, and a molecular and human geneticist. (In other words, she’s really smart.) Read her column ...
